title: Embarked on PhD Journey
description: Officially began my PhD at ETH Zurich under the mentorship of Roger Wattenhofer.

title: Appointed Head TA
description: Became head teaching assistant for the Hands-On Deep Learning course, completely overhauling and modernizing the curriculum to make it more engaging, challenging, and relevant for students.

title: PhD Aptitude Colloquium Passed
description: Successfully passed my Aptitude Colloquium, securing my official status as a PhD student at ETH Zurich and taking the next step in my research journey.

title: DCC Paper Accepted
description: 'Conditional Hallucinations for Image Compression' is accepted at DCC2025! ConHa steers hallucinations in neural image compression so reconstructions stay realistic and artifact-free, better matching what humans actually prefer.

title: CLIC2025 Organizing Team
description: Joining the CLIC2025 organizing team, where I am carrying out the human evaluation study for the challenge.

title: Mind the Gap Paper Accepted
description: Happy to share that 'Mind the Gap' is accepted at NeurIPS2025! By injecting Gumbel noise during training, we close the gap between soft and hard logic gates, letting these tiny networks converge much faster.

title: Internship at Mabyduck
description: Starting an internship at Mabyduck, where I am working on quality assessment of AI-generated images.

title: Light DLGNs Paper Accepted
description: 'Light Differentiable Logic Gate Networks' got accepted at ICLR2026! A simple reparametrization that shrinks model size, speeds up training, and stabilizes accuracy — finally letting us scale logic gate networks deeper without losing performance.

title: BBQ Paper Accepted
description: BBQ is headed to ICML2026! 'Efficient Bayesian Inference from Noisy Pairwise Comparisons' models rater noise to downweight unreliable annotators, making human evaluation of AI-generated content more accurate, stable, and cost-effective.
